appraisal_events.evidence: « il se tenait constamment le plus éloigné de moi qu'il pouvait... dans l'espoir que je n'entendisse pas les flatteries... qu'il... prodiguait à Mme de Villeparisis. » / « Elle haussa les épaules... et se tourna vers l'historien. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Legrandin as obsequious and furtive, constantly flattering Mme de Villeparisis. Her shrug and turning away underscore that his compliments are not taken seriously, compounding his local diminishment.

status_effects.explanation: He appears sycophantic and evasive, and his target's dismissive reaction lowers him locally.
